Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-11 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker data shows ICHR dominating the rankings with a composite score of 95.8 and rank #1, driven by exceptional consistency across timeframes—particularly a 3.71x ratio between 3-month and 1-month returns and perfect scores across all SMA gates. SITM ranks second with a 6m return of +165.29% and 1y return of +378.24%, but shows weaker ratio consistency (only 3 of 5 ratio passes versus ICHR's 5 of 5) and a notably higher bad-spy-day score of 5.65 compared to ICHR's 1.02, suggesting ICHR maintains steadier performance during market downturns. Both tickers display strong absolute returns and price action above all major moving averages, but ICHR's pattern consistency and resilience during adverse market conditions make it the stronger momentum candidate by the dashboard's scoring methodology.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
